headline: Ford Stock Up 45% Over the Past Year: Buy, Hold or Sell?
summary: Ford's rally may have more room as Ford Pro expands margins, Novelis supply normalizes and a strong balance sheet helps offset EV and cost pressure.

headline: See which Tennessee companies are asking for $3B in tariff refunds
summary: Some of the largest companies in Tennessee or with state ties are seeking billions in tariff refunds from the government, but will customers see any money?

headline: Thousands of Dauch, Lockheed Dauch workers vote to ratify union contracts
summary: Nearly 1,000 UAW-represented Dauch workers’ ratified contract ends the two-week strike at the GM supplier’s Michigan plant. About 5,000 IAM-represented Lockheed Martin employees also voted for a new deal on Sunday.

raw.headline: Thousands of Dauch, Lockheed Dauch workers vote to ratify union contracts
raw.summary: Nearly 1,000 UAW-represented Dauch workers’ ratified contract ends the two-week strike at the GM supplier’s Michigan plant. About 5,000 IAM-represented Lockheed Martin employees also voted for a new deal on Sunday.
